tools.name: hokmah_analyze
tools.description: Analyze impact of a code change. Returns risk score, affected files, related commits. FREE — zero LLM tokens.

tools.name: hokmah_generate_tests
tools.description: Generate tests from the architectural graph. 40x fewer tokens. PRO — requires API key.

tools.name: hokmah_generate_code
tools.description: Generate code with architectural memory. Reduces hallucination via graph context. PRO — requires API key.

tools.name: hokmah_connect_project
tools.description: Connect a GitHub repo to Hokmah. Builds TransitionGraph + IdeaGraph + WorldModel from commit history. FREE.

tools.name: hokmah_connect_mcp
tools.description: Connect an external MCP server to Hokmah for universal tool orchestration. FREE.
